text:
is a mobile weapon appearing in the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel series.

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA

A mobile weapon for suppressing Angel-scale threats. Deployed by the Japanese Strategic Self Defense Force outside the Hakone caldera after the area was designated as UN-leased land. A miniaturized N² Reactor Provides the substantial power required to Project the microwaves from its laser. It delivers energy to Evangelion Unit-02 Type II equipped with Microwave Rectenna.
